articles.title: US issues 30-day sanction waiver for Russian oil
articles.summary: US issues 30-day sanction waiver for Russian oil The United States has extended a waiver allowing access to Russian oil , as it moves to ease pressure on global energy supplies following its on Iran and the resulting bloackade on the Strait of Hormouz. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Washington will issue a 30-day general licence to enable the temporary release of cargoes blocked during recent disruptions. articles.title: Israel raid of Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus sparks outrage
articles.summary: Israel raid of Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus sparks outrage The Gaza-bound Global Sumud Flotilla reported Israeli naval forces raiding several of its vessels near Cyprus, in the latest attack on the aid mission in international waters. In a statement sent to Middle East Eye, the mission said it is "currently surrounded and under active interception by Israeli naval warships in international waters," approximately 250 nautical miles from the Gaza Strip's coast.  It added that the "military encirclement marks the commencement of another illegal, high-seas aggression".
